evidence: The operation and producer digests were collected in the isolated WP-CONTRACT-01 worktree based on iOS revision 92a5c351a42771f546b3d0e575b3b37a8cbfb588 and include the source-proven PATCH/GET corrections in this uncommitted contract branch.
No committed iOS source revision is claimed for the corrected inventory; scripts/refresh-fixtures.sh independently checks every current producer symbol and source path.
The backend generator validates its hand-registered operations and producer variant IDs against this independent manifest, but it does not inspect or instantiate Swift endpoint factories.
Exact factory and call-site membership remains an iOS-consumer validation responsibility; only six native producers currently have exact factory tests.
Only 24 of the 60 partial operations currently feed the bundle success payload through the production iOS model decoder and a cache round-trip.
